{
  "judge_id": "demo-judge",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.4": 3, "RX.1": 4, "RX.3": 5, "RX.4": 4, "RX.5": 2},
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The artifact compares StepWise-CoT to three variants of the authors' prior work, but not against a broader set of step-by-step prompting methods.",
    "RX.1": "The artifact does not explicitly quantify uncertainty for its claims.",
    "RX.3": "The artifact focuses on evaluating StepWise-CoT on GSM8K, MultiArith, and AQuA-RAT benchmarks, which aligns with the requested dimensions.",
    "RX.4": "The artifact does not identify any potential harmful patterns introduced by StepWise-CoT.",
    "RX.5": "The artifact mentions that the baselines are variants of prior work but does not provide specific details on how the changes were made or why."
  },
  "confidence": {"R1.4": 0.8, "RX.1": 0.9, "RX.3": 0.9, "RX.4": 0.7, "RX.5": 0.6},
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The artifact compares StepWise-CoT to three variants of the authors' prior work, but not against a broader set of step-by-step prompting methods.
rationale.RX.1: The artifact does not explicitly quantify uncertainty for its claims.
rationale.RX.3: The artifact focuses on evaluating StepWise-CoT on GSM8K, MultiArith, and AQuA-RAT benchmarks, which aligns with the requested dimensions.
rationale.RX.4: The artifact does not identify any potential harmful patterns introduced by StepWise-CoT.
rationale.RX.5: The artifact mentions that the baselines are variants of prior work but does not provide specific details on how the changes were made or why.
